entity.summary: Multichain automated-market-maker decentralized exchange with liquidity and spot-trading activity across BNB Chain, Cronos, Ethereum, Gnosis, Avalanche, Polygon, Fantom, Kava, and the Empire chain.
entity.notes: DefiLlama reports current multichain TVL and non-zero 30-day, 7-day, and 24-hour DEX volume. A stable first-party website surface was not recovered during this review pass, so URL fields remain unset rather than guessed.

evidence.title: EmpireDEX official social profile
evidence.notes: Project social identity linked from the current protocol registry and used as identity corroboration.

evidence.title: EmpireDEX metrics and protocol information
evidence.notes: Protocol registry identifies EmpireDEX as a multichain AMM DEX and reports current TVL plus non-zero 30-day, 7-day, and 24-hour DEX volume across multiple EVM networks.

evidence.title: EmpireDEX DEX discovery entry
evidence.notes: DEX candidate corpus independently identifies EmpireDEX as a multichain decentralized exchange.
